name: Pecan Pie Mini Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, flour and pecans; set aside.
2. Combine butter and eggs; mix well.
3. Stir the butter and egg mixture into the flour mixture just until moistened.
4. Fill greased and floured or paper-lined miniature muffin cups two-thirds full.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes, or until the mini muffins are done.
6. Remove immediately to cool on wire racks.
Yield: about 2-1/2 dozen.
